workflow_runs.display_title: feat(i18n): update invoke button and output label translations to inc…

head_commit.message:
feat(i18n): add placeholders to BTN_INVOKE and LABEL_OUTPUT_FOR in en.json

- Updated BTN_INVOKE to include {{name}} placeholder
- Updated LABEL_OUTPUT_FOR to include {{name}} placeholder
- Enables dynamic content rendering in Web3 sandbox interface

Signed-off-by: Devansh Vashisht <devansh.vashisht.ug24@nsut.ac.in>
